title: pilea obscura var. obscura
intro: Pilea obscura var. obscura is a variety of plant in the Urticaceae family, commonly known as the Chinese ivy or Indian pepper. It is a type of herb used in traditional medicine, primarily for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Pilea obscura var. obscura are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
